mappings.reason: Encrypt Sensitive Data at Rest directly implements encryption for data stored on servers, applications, and databases, satisfying the primary and dominant requirement of CRY-06 for organizational data at rest.
Encrypt Data on End-User Devices addresses the encryption requirement for a specific subset of data at rest locations (endpoints), complementing the server-focused coverage of 3.11.
Encrypt Data on Removable Media addresses the encryption requirement for a specific subset of data at rest locations (removable storage), ensuring coverage for portable media.
Protect Recovery Data requires equivalent controls (referencing encryption) for backup data, satisfying the encryption requirement for the backup data subset of data at rest.
